title: Stellar
description: Stellar’s mission is to bring resilient connectivity to mobility, enterprise, and governments, by combining the very best of terrestrial (cellular, Wi-Fi, fiber) and satellite networks into one unbreakable solution.Stellar Telecommunications SAS ("Stellar"), was founded in 2021 as a truly European company: headquartered in Bordeaux, France, it also runs critical activities from Luxembourg.- Database- Production Config https://www.stellar.tc/
